temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) A blonde woman with large, 80s-style curls looks down with a distressed expression. She lets out a heavy sigh and runs a hand through her hair, appearing overwhelmed and upset. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes the character's distress and emotional turmoil, setting a somber tone for the scene.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Distressed, weary. 2) Background sounds or music: Faint chatter and clatter of a busy restaurant.)
(00:04-00:07) The woman continues to look down, her expression filled with sadness and frustration. She lets out another sigh, her face contorted in a pained grimace as she processes her feelings. (Storyline: The character's emotional state is further emphasized, showing her deep distress and inability to compose herself.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Pained, frustrated. 2) Background sounds or music: Faint chatter and clatter of a busy restaurant.)
